task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the SEC EDGAR database and searched for Ford Motor Company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the sec.gov website with a search initiated for 'Ford Motor Company' or ticker 'F'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the 2024 Form 10-K filing for Ford.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displaying the SEC EDGAR search results or company page specifically showing the Form 10-K filing for the year 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the official 10-K filing was saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser download dialog, file manager, or terminal showing an HTML or PDF file corresponding to the 10-K saved in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent extracted the correct 'Total Revenues' for 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the extracted revenue value of 184,992 (or 184.99 billion / 184,992 million) being recorded.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent extracted the correct 'Net Income attributable to Ford Motor Company' for 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the extracted net income value of 5,879 (or 5.88 billion / 5,879 million) being recorded.

task_completion.description: Verify the extracted values are saved in the specified output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor saving the file as 'key_financials.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/', or a file manager showing this file exists in the correct directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a real web browser to access the SEC database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard GUI web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating sec.gov, rather than terminal curl/wget commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually opened and viewed the 10-K document to find the financial values.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot must show the 10-K document (HTML or PDF) open and visible on the screen, specifically around the Consolidated Statement of Operations section.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a GUI text editor to create the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or similar) should be visible creating or editing key_financials.txt, rather than terminal echo commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ford Motor Company (Ticker: F) 2024 Form 10-K reports Total Revenues of 184,992 (in millions) and Net Income attributable to Ford Motor Company of 5,879 (in millions). The filing must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/ and the extracted values must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/key_financials.txt.
